name: 3-bet pot AhKd2c, tight ranges
description: Same dry A-high board as spot_001 but in a 3-bet pot. Ranges collapse to 3-bet / 3-bet-call levels. Pot is larger (18bb = 180 chips, after BTN 3-bets ~9bb and BB calls), effective stack proportionally smaller (~91bb remaining). Lower SPR means fewer bet sizes possible before the game is all-in. Hero = BB (3-bet-caller, out of position), villain = BTN.

input.hero_range: TT, JJ, QQ, KK, AA, AJs, AQs, AKs, AQo, AKo, KQs, A5s, A4s, A3s, A2s
input.villain_range: QQ, KK, AA, AKs, AKo, A5s, A4s, KQs

expected_notes: Populated by differential run. Hero's range smashes this board (has all AA/AK/KK); watch whether solver check-calls or donk-bets with BB-as-3-bet-caller convention.
